summary: Story Generator feature testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working correctly (12/12 tests passed). Frontend modal opens and displays presentation dropdown. Video generation produces valid MP4 files.
critical_code_review_comments: Host images correctly use PNG format (not GIF) as per requirements
Lemonada Bold font is properly loaded from /usr/share/fonts/opentype/lemonada/Lemonada-Bold.otf
Both 5-round and 6-round layouts are supported with correct text positioning
SharePoint integration working correctly for assets (locations, hosts, backgrounds)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (modal opens, dropdown works, generate button enabled)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Generator feature is fully functional. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_story_generator.py cover all endpoints. Video generation takes ~30-60 seconds. Both 5-round and 6-round presentations work correctly.

verified_features.GET /api/story-generator/presentations: Returns list of presentations filtered by userName
verified_features.GET /api/story-generator/presentation/{i: Returns presentation details with rounds info
verified_features.GET /api/story-generator/assets: Returns hosts (PNG type), locations, backgrounds from SharePoint
verified_features.POST /api/story-generator/preview/{id}: Generates preview with asset availability status
verified_features.Frontend StoryGenerator modal: Opens correctly, shows presentation dropdown with round counts
